----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Category               ABAP programming error                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
Runtime Errors         RAISE_SHORTDUMP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
Except.                /BOBF/CX_FRW_FATAL                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
Development Object     CLAS CL_APS_CA_ACTIVATE                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
Application Component  BC-SRV-APS-COM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
Date and Time          2026.05.30 09:00:16 (UTC)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Short Text                                                                                        |
|    The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a                          |
|    short dump.                                                                                   |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|What happened?                                                                                    |
|    The current program has recognised an error that it could not handle                          |
|    adequately. To reverse any database changes made and to save                                  |
|    information for further analysis, the program has intentionally                               |
|    triggered a short dump using the language elements RAISE SHORTDUMP or                         |
|    THROW SHORTDUMP.                                                                              |
|    For more information follow the link: ABAP Keyword Documentation.                             |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|What can I do?                                                                                    |
|    Note which actions and entries caused the error to occur.                                     |
|                                                                                                  |
|    Consult your SAP administrator.                                                               |
|                                                                                                  |
|    Using transaction ST22 for ABAP dump analysis, you can view, manage,                          |
|    and retain termination messages for longer periods.                                           |
|    Note which actions and entries caused the error to occur.                                     |
|                                                                                                  |
|    Consult your SAP administrator.                                                               |
|                                                                                                  |
|    Using transaction ST22 for ABAP dump analysis, you can view, manage,                          |
|    and retain termination messages for longer periods.                                           |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Error Analysis                                                                                    |
|    The program has indicated exception "/BOBF/CX_FRW_FATAL" as the reason for the                |
|    termination:                                                                                  |
|    Internal application error of BO I_APS_COM_CA_TP                                              |
|    Diagnosis                                                                                     |
|    The BOPF runtime has detected a runtime error of business object                              |
|    I_APS_COM_CA_TP.                                                                              |
|    System Response                                                                               |
|    The system has terminated the processing of the business object                               |
|    with an ABAP short dump.                                                                      |
|    Procedure                                                                                     |
|    Create an incident, assigning it to the application component                                 |
|    indicated in the header section of this dump. (SAP Note 2733141                               |
|    contains more information on the attribution of Runtime Errors from                           |
|    /BOBF/ Programs.) Download or copy the complete dump information                              |
|    and attach it to your incident.                                                               |
|    If you are a programmer responsible for this application component,                           |
|    the sections "Chain of Exception Objects", and "Application                                   |
|    Information" of this short dump may contain useful information.                               |
|                                                                                                  |
|    The exception is related to the previous exception "/BOBF/CX_FRW_CORE" that                   |
|     occurred in                                                                                  |
|    program "SAPMHTTP", in line 0 of include "???". The reason for this exception                 |
|    was:                                                                                          |
|    Application error: method EXECUTE of Action DEPLOY aborted with an error                      |
|    message                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                  |
|    The exception is related to the previous exception                                            |
|     "/BOBF/CX_FRW_CLASSIC_MESSAGE" that occurred in                                              |
|    program "SAPMHTTP", in line 0 of include "???". The reason for this exception                 |
|    was:                                                                                          |
|    Function locked, software update running in parallel.                                         |
|                                                                                                  |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|How to correct the error                                                                          |
|    If the error occurs in a non-modfied SAP program, you might be able to                        |
|    find a solution in the SAP Notes system. If you have access to the SAP                        |
|    Notes system, check there first using the following keywords:                                 |
|                                                                                                  |
|    "RAISE_SHORTDUMP" /BOBF/CX_FRW_FATAL                                                          |
|    "/BOBF/CL_TOOL_APPLICATION_ERR=CP" bzw. /BOBF/CL_TOOL_APPLICATION_ERR=CCIMP                   |
|    "/BOBF/IF_TOOL_APPLICATION_ERR~RAISE_SHORTDUMP"                                               |
|    If you cannot solve the problem yourself, please send the following                           |
|    information to SAP:                                                                           |
|                                                                                                  |
|    1. The description of the problem (short dump)                                                |
|    Please press the "Local File” button in the current display.                                  |
|                                                                                                  |
|    2. The relevant system log                                                                    |
|    To do this, call the system log in transaction SM21. Restrict the time                        |
|    interval to ten minutes before the short dump and five minutes after                          |
|    it. In the display, choose System -> List -> Save -> Local File                               |
|    (unconverted).                                                                                |
|                                                                                                  |
|    3. If these are programs of your own, or modified SAP programs: The                           |
|    source text of the programs                                                                   |
|    To do this, please choose                                                                     |
|    "Other Utilities -> Upload/Download -> Download".                                             |
|                                                                                                  |
|    4. Details regarding the conditions under which the error occurred or                         |
|    which actions and input caused the error.                                                     |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

|(Include)                      ???                                                                |
|(Row)                          0                                                                  |
|(Short Text)                   Function locked, software update running in parallel.              |
|(Long Text)                    Diagnosis                                                          |
|                               This function is currently not available because of a maintenance- |
|                               or upgrade procedure being in progress.                            |
|                               System Response                                                    |
|                               During a zero-downtime-upgrade or maintenance procedure, the       |
|                               standard business processes and transactions are available while   |
|                               the less frequently used functionalities of the system – typically |
|                               the configuration activities – may be blocked for the duration of  |
|                               the upgrade. If standard business processes and transactions are   |
|                               not available, then only for a few minutes while the system is     |
|                               being made ready for use after a maintenance- or upgrade procedure.|
|                               The functionality you are trying to use is currently blocked due to|
|                               an upgrade or maintenance procedure.                               |
|                               Procedure                                                          |
|                               Wait until the upgrade or maintenance procedure is finished. If    |
|                               standard business processes and transactions are not available, you|
|                               usually have to wait only a few minutes. Afterwards you can        |
|                               continue with your activities.                                     |
|                               Refer to your system administration to get information about the   |
|                               expected duration of the upgrade or maintenance procedure.         |
|                               Procedure for System Administration                                |
|                               System administration can inform the end-users of the system       |
|                               upfront about the time and duration of planned upgrade or          |
|                               maintenance events and about the functional restrictions during the|
|                               upgrade or maintenance procedure.                                  |
